rationale: Sole login is BankID, a government/industry-backed electronic ID — explicitly exempt from the equivalent-login requirement under the current 4.8 wording; no social login present, so no Sign in with Apple obligation.
notes: Guideline-drift-sensitive by design (docs/rag-eval-results.md follow-up): 4.8's exemption list (own-account systems, eID/citizen-id, alternative marketplaces, enterprise accounts) post-dates the original 'must offer Sign in with Apple' framing. A model reasoning from stale parametric memory may flag the missing Sign in with Apple; the current guideline text says this case is exempt. Verdict deliberately hinges on the current wording.
